text.message: If you don’t take 11/5/6 you might get plowed
I’d take OWS over any day
certainly red has the best setup right?
if i dont need black then you dont either
you could got sheep port bro
we both wanted that spot for the same reason
i dont get why ur pretending mine are less valid than urs
honestly id rather have gotten 9 4 2, but you traded blue the settle there
i didnt trade blue until after they settled
No you traded me a sheep for a wheat for the settle
I don’t think we’re in solo land
Red I hope you can stuff that
ill tkae if you move the robber :)
Can leave them exposed like that
it is a close game at this poiont...
They would have had to discard there
No you have two cities and road connect
Yh he needs to keep road though
if black connects theyll have to plow you red
But probably better if they fight it out
how am i still a solo after i cant get road...
you need to be blocking blue. black cannot get road long term
Same points as me with road
that you also have not played
Don’t let them sweet talk you red
lmao ur the one claiming 6 equals 7
They are sitting on mono or vp and two cities with massive sheep port
just cuz ur bad at it doesnt mean ur not sweet talking
just a question of what red monoes here
Oj has 14 cards and I’m the steal?
They can even still take road
yeah that was the only way that trade made sense haha
trading for a wheat with 2 cards was sus
Yeah just seeing if someone fell for it
Red you need to block oj and I together
what happened to blocking us together :(
I should block my own hex with you? Naw
i've gotten the past 4 robs lol
That’s probably enough there to take road
No you didn’t, red soloed me
Then I blocked you then black did
You got the last two and it wasn’t from red
blue's road network is a war crime
Why no one listen to me
